title: macaranga mappa
intro: Macaranga mappa, also known as the Buddhist pine, is a tropical tree native to the coastal regions of Australia and Southeast Asia. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Macaranga mappa include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Macaranga mappa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
